response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced generalist (~19 years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js, cloud, and testing craftsmanship, and his current role at re:cinq touches directly relevant ground (MCP code generators, agentic-workflow tooling). However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, while his demonstrable GenAI experience spans roughly one year. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or Python at production depth, and customer-facing technical discovery leadership is only indirectly suggested through consulting and workshop experience.
strengths: Current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow infrastructure
Deep full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong engineering-excellence background: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: Falls well short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Python is absent from the skill set despite being a key required language

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling exposure in current role
Missing RAG/vector DB and Python evidence
